title: Insert Interval
problem_statement: Insert a new interval into a sorted list of non-overlapping intervals and merge if necessary.

examples.explanation: The new interval overlaps with [1,3], so they merge into [1,5].

intuition: Use a single pass to add non-overlapping intervals, merge overlapping ones, and then append the remainder.

approaches.name: Linear scan with merge
approaches.description: Add intervals that end before newInterval starts, merge overlapping intervals into newInterval, then append the rest.
approaches.why_not: Inserting then sorting is slower and unnecessary because the input is already sorted.

interview_qa.a: Skip intervals that come completely before the new interval.

interview_qa.q: How do you merge overlapping intervals?
interview_qa.a: Extend the new interval start/end to cover any overlapping intervals.
